title: CVE-2021-22515 — CVSS 4.8 (MEDIUM)
content:
# CVE-2021-22515

CVSS Score: 4.8 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2021-07-12T11:15:07.713
CWEs: CWE-863

Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) functionality can be bypassed, allowing the use of single factor authentication in NetIQ Advanced Authentication versions prior to 6.3 SP4 Patch 1.

References: https://www.netiq.com/documentation/advanced-authentication-63/advanced-authentication-releasenotes-6341/data/advanced-authentication-releasenotes-6341.html, https://www.netiq.com/documentation/advanced-authentication-63/advanced-authentication-releasenotes-6341/data/advanced-authentication-releasenotes-6341.html
